title: H-Line Christmas Hamper Basket, Wicker Gift Basket, Split Willow with Purple Decoration, Make Your Own Hamper Kit with Cellophane, Wood Shred & Bow Set,for Christmas, Easter Gift Hampers (Red)
features: PREMIUM WICKER GIFT HAMPER BASKET - Elevate your gifting with this H-Line wicker gift hamper basket. Expertly handwoven from natural split willow. Its rich texture and purple decorative trim create a luxurious look. Perfect for Christmas hampers, wedding gifts, birthdays and festive celebrations.

MAKE YOUR OWN HAMPER KIT - Designed as a versatile oval empty hamper tray (45×36×12 cm) offering generous space for chocolates, wines, candles, or pamper items. Ideal for DIY enthusiasts who love to make their own hamper kits and create personalised gifts for friends and family.

NATURAL SPLIT WILLOW WITH PURPLE DECORATION - Crafted from durable split willow wicker. This decorative storage basket combines rustic charm with modern elegance. The purple accent band adds sophistication to any decor. Making it perfect for home decoration, table displays or event centrepieces.

MULTI-PURPOSE DECORATIVE STORAGE BASKET - Beautiful yet practical, this woven wicker basket can be reused as a home organiser, fruit basket, bread basket or decorative display. Its sturdy build and elegant design make it a stunning addition to home & kitchen decor, parties and weddings.

ECO-FRIENDLY, LIGHTWEIGHT & EASY TO MAINTAIN - An environmentally friendly choice for sustainable living. The H-Line split willow basket is lightweight, strong and reusable. Reducing waste while maintaining style. Simply wipe or lightly dust to keep your gift hamper basket looking fresh and new.
description: Bring style and sophistication to your gifting with the H-Line Wicker Gift Hamper Basket. Expertly handcrafted from natural split willow, this oval empty hamper tray (45×36×12 cm) features a beautiful purple decorative trim that adds a touch of luxury to any presentation. Perfect for Christmas hampers, weddings, birthdays, parties, and corporate gifting, it provides ample space for chocolates, wines, beauty products, candles and more. Designed for versatility, the H-Line make-your-own hamper kit allows you to create stunning personalized gift sets or use it as a decorative storage basket for your home. Its strong wicker build ensures long-lasting durability while remaining lightweight and easy to carry. Eco-friendly and reusable, this woven willow basket is both practical and elegant. Ideal for home décor, table displays, or festive arrangements. Simply wipe or lightly dust to maintain its natural charm and keep it ready for every special occasion.
